name: Battery Capacity Converter (mAh ↔ Wh)
description: Convert between battery capacity in mAh and Wh (Watt-hours).
formulaDescription: Energy (Wh) equals capacity (mAh) multiplied by voltage (V) divided by 1000. Reverse calculation converts Wh back to mAh.

example.explanation: A 5000 mAh battery at 11.55V has a capacity of 57.75 Wh.

faqs.question: What voltage should I use?
faqs.answer: Use the nominal voltage of your battery pack. LiPo cells are 3.7V nominal; a 3S pack is 11.1V, 4S is 14.8V, etc.

faqs.question: Why are mAh and Wh different?
faqs.answer: mAh measures charge capacity, while Wh measures energy. Wh accounts for voltage, making it more useful for energy calculations.
